_comment: Sample query body the Search API would POST to AI Search at request time.
queryType=semantic + vectorQueries=text gives hybrid (BM25 + vector via integrated
vectorisation) with the L2 cross-encoder semantic re-ranker on top of the top-50.
The Search API enforces the no-results threshold from architecture §5 by checking
@search.rerankerScore on the top result before returning to the client.
search: Why should a customer work with us?

vectorQueries.text: Why should a customer work with us?

_no_results_threshold_note: AI Search returns @search.rerankerScore in the 0..4 range (4 = perfect).
The Search API rejects any top result with @search.rerankerScore < 1.5
and returns the no-results state instead. The threshold is tuned
against the golden set in CI (§8).
